jack-daniels-fudge.name: Jack Daniel's Fudge
instructions: Line a 5x7-inch baking dish with aluminum foil, leaving an overhang for easy removal.

Place chocolate chips in a microwave-safe glass bowl; microwave in 15-second intervals until melted, stirring after each interval, 1 to 3 minutes. Stir in sweetened condensed milk, whiskey, vanilla, and salt until completely incorporated; stir in pecans.
Pour fudge into the prepared baking dish; let set for 2 to 3 hours. Remove fudge from dish using foil overhang; cut into 24 squares.
